mapper.select:
SELECT p.*, u.real_name as studentName, u.username as studentUsername, c.college_name as collegeName FROM paper_info p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN college c ON p.college_id = c.id WHERE p.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND p.paper_status = 'auditing' AND p.is_deleted = 0
AND c.college_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{college}, '%')
AND p.similarity_rate <= 20
AND p.similarity_rate > 20 AND p.similarity_rate <= 40
AND p.similarity_rate > 40
ORDER BY
p.submit_time ASC
p.submit_time DESC
p.check_time ASC
p.check_time DESC
p.submit_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paper_info p WHERE p.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND p.paper_status = 'auditing' AND p.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paper_info p WHERE p.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND p.paper_status != 'auditing' AND DATE(p.update_time) = CURDATE() AND p.is_deleted = 0
